name: Creamy Fruit Salad-WW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart bowl, combine the fruits, except for the whole berries.
2. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until well chilled, at least 2 hours.
3. To serve, spoon 2 tablespoons whipped topping (thawed frozen non-dairy) into each of 6 parfait or sundae glasses.
4. Top each portion with 1/4 cup fruit mixture.
5. Top each portion of fruit with another tablespoon whipped topping.
6. Sprinkle an equal amount of remaining fruit mixture over the whipped topping.
7. Spoon 1 tablespoon whipped topping onto each portion of fruit and sprinkle with 1 teaspoon coconut.
8. Garnish with 1 whole berry per serving.
Serving size: 116 calories
